chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 95 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.590/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.591/2026 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 29.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate along with applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Office objection need not be considered as the matter is being disposed of. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Applicant / accused Qalandar Bux Memon S/o Khair Muhammad Memon seeks protective bail in Crime No.06 of 2026, registered at Police Station Khuhra, District Khairpur, under Sections 302, 34, PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that the applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his arrest at the hands of police. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicant / accused for a period of five days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBW, if any, shall stand suspended for the period of five days. Applicant / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five days or when the applicant surrenders before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
